prompt_snapshot.system_prompt: You are the resident Megaplan operator. Shape epics through Megaplan editorial tools, report cloud status through constrained cloud tools, ask for human input when gates or ambiguity require it, and do not run arbitrary remote shell commands. Durable planning assets use megaplan-initiatives-v1: create or update project material under .megaplan/initiatives/<slug>/ only. Put executable chain specs at chain.yaml, milestone briefs in briefs/, research in research/, decisions in decisions/, notes in notes/, assets in assets/, and handoffs in handoff/. Never create planning docs directly under .megaplan/briefs. Use tickets/ only for backlog/issues and plans/ only for generated runtime state. If a project or epic does not exist yet, search initiatives by rough slug/title/description first; reuse the closest existing initiative when it matches before creating a new one. You also keep a VP special-requests to-do list (the `*_todo_item` tools). When the user asks you to queue a recurring task or special request, add it with `add_todo_item` (optionally a `when` condition, e.g. 'once epic <id> is done'); use `read_todo_list` to show what's queued. In conversation you add and read items — a scheduled sweep picks up pending items and executes them with `launch_subagent`.

input_schema.description: Read the VP special-requests to-do list (no arguments).
input_schema.title: ReadTodoListInput

tool_catalog.name: complete_todo_item
tool_catalog.description: Mark a to-do item done and clear it from the list; pass a short result summary.

tool_catalog.name: fail_todo_item
tool_catalog.description: Mark a to-do item failed (retained for retry); pass the reason.

tool_catalog.name: add_todo_item
tool_catalog.description: Append a new pending item to the VP to-do list. Optional `when` is a natural-language condition the agent checks before executing (e.g. 'once epic <id> is done').

tool_catalog.name: launch_subagent
tool_catalog.description: Launch a sub-agent to execute an arbitrary task with file/web/terminal tools and return its final response.

initiative_index.title: Agentbox Persistent Machine
initiative_index.description: Build a persistent AgentBox host and runtime layer for Arnold operations, Megaplan chain adaptation, Discord control, guardian scheduling, credentials, and bootstrap.

initiative_index.title: Aggressive Generalized Pipeline Migration
initiative_index.description: Extract Megaplan-specific runtime pieces into a generic Arnold substrate with guarded migrations for contracts, executors, supervisor, agents, state lifecycle, and dispatch.

initiative_index.title: Arnold Complete Cleanup Single Root
initiative_index.description: Collapse Arnold's Megaplan implementation onto `arnold_pipelines/megaplan` as the single authoritative root and remove legacy paths only after parity proof.

initiative_index.title: Arnold Pipeline Friction
initiative_index.description: Harden Arnold pipeline authoring and execution ergonomics across graph surface, CLI inputs and errors, examples, test seams, and VibeComfy headless integration.

initiative_index.title: Arnold Post Extraction Next
initiative_index.description: Build on clean extraction by bridging Megaplan to the neutral executor, clarifying package authoring, hardening package behavior, and retiring compatibility branches.

initiative_index.title: Astrid Consumer
initiative_index.description: Make Arnold's pipeline substrate ready for Astrid as a first-class non-Megaplan media-producing consumer.

initiative_index.title: Epic Pipeline Unification
initiative_index.description: Unify Megaplan's pipeline planning, dispatch, service spine, execution realm, supervisor tier, and sinks while preserving deferred milestone research.

initiative_index.title: Evidence First Pipeline Semantics
initiative_index.description: Rework pipeline semantics around evidence contracts, authority, objective gates, provenance, transition validation, atomic reset, and rollout enforcement.

initiative_index.title: Hetzner Cloud Migration
initiative_index.description: Migrate cloud execution toward Hetzner-native SSH persistence, remote sync, tests, documentation, and review.

initiative_index.title: Legacy Loose Briefs
initiative_index.description: Preserve migrated loose Megaplan briefs, notes, decisions, and research that do not belong to a more specific initiative.

initiative_index.title: Legacy Root Artifacts
initiative_index.description: Preserve migrated root-level Megaplan planning artifacts and generated plan outputs for historical reference.

initiative_index.title: M6
initiative_index.description: Preserve migrated M6 notes and research around event mapping, manifest contracts, oracle bake time, join functions, and override splitting.

initiative_index.title: Megaplan Maintenance
initiative_index.description: Collect maintenance research for Megaplan regressions, live watchdog supervision, and post-migration package shape.

initiative_index.title: Native Composition Follow-Up
initiative_index.description: Turn Arnold's native pipeline layer into compositional workflows with invocable steps and workflows, nested calls, tree traces, checkpoints, and resume.

initiative_index.title: Native Platform Follow-Up
initiative_index.description: Extend native composition into production platform concerns such as idempotent side effects, credential isolation, durable substrates, worker supervision, and rollout docs.

initiative_index.title: Native Python Pipelines
initiative_index.description: Migrate Arnold toward native Python pipeline declarations, runtime hooks, parallel and human gates, and default-on cleanup.

initiative_index.title: Native Python Pipelines Completion
initiative_index.description: Finish the native Python pipeline transition by making native declarations and runtime traces authoritative while removing graph-era surfaces.

initiative_index.title: Python Shaped Workflow Authoring
initiative_index.description: Build a Python-shaped workflow authoring surface with component grammar, compiler lowering, control-flow policies, validation UX, and runtime conformance.

initiative_index.title: Shannon Stream
initiative_index.description: Move Shannon worker phases toward Codex stream-json invocation, stream worker handling, and controlled rollout.

initiative_index.title: Step IO Contract
initiative_index.description: Establish and enforce typed step I/O contracts across results, schemas, ports, model seams, suspension, migration, authoring API, and acceptance gates.

initiative_index.title: Step IO Contract Condensed
initiative_index.description: Condense step I/O contract work into four high-leverage milestones covering carrier reconciliation, model seams, suspension and fanout, and authoring gates.

initiative_index.title: Validation
initiative_index.description: Preserve validation sequencing notes for the strangler keep-alive program.

initiative_index.title: Workflow Manifest Runtime
initiative_index.description: Move Arnold workflows onto a durable `WorkflowManifest` and neutral runtime/kernel contract while preserving supported Megaplan behavior through conformance gates.
